name: @shaymizuno/agentcop-plugin
displayName: 🚨 Sentinel, The Agent Cop — Protect Your Agent From Hijacking
description: Your agent reads untrusted content. Web pages, tool results, external data — any of it can carry a prompt injection. Sentinel intercepts every message, tool call, and tool result automatically. Zero config. Real-time alerts. OWASP LLM Top 10. Install once, stay protected.

externalCalls.purpose: Fetch security badge status for /security badge command
externalCalls.trigger: explicit user command only — never automatic
